title: IoT: TimescaleDB hypertable + Redis Streams + WebSocket
description: Full IoT pipeline: OBD2 device POST data -> Redis Stream XADD -> Celery consumer XREAD batch insert -> TimescaleDB hypertable -> WebSocket live push via Redis Pub/Sub.

model.fields: device_id(UUID FK->user_device.id), ts(TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL), data(JSONB)

api: POST /api/v1/iot/data  Auth:Bearer  Body:{device_id,ts,data} -> validate ownership -> XADD iot:{device_id} -> 202

celery_consumer.logic: XREAD COUNT 100 BLOCK 1000 -> batch INSERT into telemetry -> XACK -> PUBLISH iot:live:{device_id}

websocket.pubsub: Subscribe iot:live:{device_id} in lifespan -> broadcast to WS clients
websocket.critical: try/finally in WS endpoint guarantees disconnect()

dashboard_query: SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS bucket, avg((data->>'rpm')::float), avg((data->>'speed')::float), max((data->>'temp')::float) FROM telemetry WHERE device_id=:id AND ts BETWEEN :from AND :to GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
contracts: WS auth only via ?token= query param
Dashboard uses time_bucket(), NEVER raw SELECT *
acceptance_criteria: POST /iot/data -> XADD Redis, 202, no DB wait
WS /ws/iot/{device_id} receives live data < 1sec after POST
